request.note_content:
## Sprint Planning

This sprint we need to:
- Review the API design
- Set up CI/CD pipeline
- Write unit tests for auth module
- Schedule design review meeting with the team

Deadline: End of next week
Team: Backend (3 devs), Frontend (2 devs)

response.summary: Weekly project planning discussion focusing on sprint deliverables for the backend and frontend teams. Key priorities include API design review, CI/CD pipeline setup, and unit testing for the auth module, with a deadline at the end of next week.
action_items: Review API design documentation with the team
Set up CI/CD pipeline for automated deployments
Write unit tests for the authentication module
